headline: Private Banking CIO Tactical Update: Shift from Defensive Value to US Technology Mega-Caps.
summary: The CIO office has issued a tactical asset allocation update for Q3 2026, recommending a reduction in Defensive Value (Consumer Staples & Healthcare) exposure by 8-12% to fund positions in Microsoft, Apple, NVIDIA, and Alphabet. The update cites AI-driven productivity tailwinds and recommends immediate portfolio rebalancing for all mandates.
